elements.title: dams
elements.contents: ... that many dams (example pictured) built on international rivers have led to political conflicts over water sharing, exacerbated by population increases, impacts of climate change, and water scarcity?

elements.title: Taste
elements.contents: ... that recording sessions for his album Taste left singer Haechan temporarily voiceless?

elements.title: Francis Méano
elements.contents: ... that Francis Méano won both the French Division 1 and the Latin Cup only a month before he died in a car accident?

elements.title: 2018 Sampang regency election
elements.contents: ... that 7,000 policemen and soldiers were deployed to secure the repeated 2018 Sampang regency election?

elements.title: death in video games
elements.contents: ... that death in video games is often presented as meaningful and tragic, even when reversible?

elements.title: George McLean Harper
elements.contents: ... that George McLean Harper invented the term "conversation poems" to describe some of Samuel Taylor Coleridge's work?

elements.title: fisherman's knots
elements.contents: ... that Inuit peoples made thread out of baleen connected with fisherman's knots?

elements.title: Johann Sigismund Weiss
elements.contents: ... that Johann Sigismund Weiss played the lute before the Holy Roman emperor and the assembled German princes at the 1711 imperial election?

elements.title: a hidden cache of tiny coffins
elements.contents: ... that in 1836, a group of schoolboys discovered a hidden cache of tiny coffins, the purpose of which is still unknown?
